---
title: \{SET\}~group~ Junction
author: Kyle P Messier
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
link-citations: yes
output:
  rmdformats::readthedown:
    css: "NIEHS.css"
    self_contained: true
    thumbnails: true
    lightbox: false
    gallery: false
    toc: 1
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes=
    toc_depth: '2'    
---

## 


## [Reproducible Research Guide](Reproducible_Research.html)

## [R Style Guide](R-Style-guide.html)


## [High Performance Computing](Scientific_Computing.html)

## [Overleaf - $\LaTeX$](Overleaf.html)

## [Project Management](Project_Management.html)

## [{SET}group logo](SETlogo.html)
